summary: Story Engine API Testing Complete. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) Credit check returns estimate with breakdown and sufficient/shortfall, (2) Job creation with atomic credit deduction works, (3) Safety checks block copyrighted characters (Spider-Man, Batman, Mickey Mouse) and celebrities (Taylor Swift), (4) Job status returns progress, state, stage_results, (5) My-jobs returns paginated user jobs, (6) Chain endpoint returns episodes, (7) Admin pipeline-health shows GPU endpoint status and job stats, (8) Admin jobs endpoint with state filters works, (9) Admin retry works on PARTIAL_READY/FAILED jobs, (10) Non-admin users get 403 on all admin endpoints, (11) Pipeline progresses through PLANNING → CHARACTER → MOTION → KEYFRAMES → CLIPS → AUDIO → ASSEMBLY → VALIDATE stages, (12) Jobs end in PARTIAL_READY when GPU workers not connected (by design).
critical_code_review_comments: story_engine_routes.py correctly checks user.role.upper() == 'ADMIN' for admin endpoints
pipeline.py create_job() performs atomic credit deduction with optimistic locking
pipeline.py _fail_job() correctly refunds credits on pipeline failure
safety.py check_content_safety() blocks copyrighted characters, celebrities, and brands
safety.py check_rate_limits() enforces MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS=2, MAX_JOBS_PER_HOUR=10, MAX_JOBS_PER_DAY=50
cost_guard.py pre_flight_check() returns CostEstimate with breakdown (21 credits total)
state_machine.py enforces strict state transitions with optimistic locking
continuity.py validate_pipeline_outputs() checks all required outputs before marking READY
continuity.py should_mark_ready() returns PARTIAL_READY when some outputs missing
Planning stages use real Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o-mini) for episode_plan, character_continuity, scene_motion_plans
GPU stages (keyframes, clips, audio) return 'queued' status when endpoints not configured
seed_data_creation: Created 2 new Story Engine jobs during testing (Crystal Cave Discovery, Robot Friend)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Engine fully verified: (1) POST /api/story-engine/create creates job with atomic credit deduction (21 credits), runs pipeline in background, (2) GET /api/story-engine/credit-check returns cost estimate with breakdown, (3) GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns progress, state, stage_results, (4) GET /api/story-engine/my-jobs returns paginated user jobs, (5) GET /api/story-engine/chain/{chain_id} returns all episodes in chain, (6) Admin endpoints: GET /admin/pipeline-health shows GPU status and job stats, GET /admin/jobs lists all jobs with state filters, POST /admin/retry/{job_id} retries FAILED/PARTIAL_READY jobs, GET /admin/job/{job_id} returns full job details. Safety checks block copyrighted characters (Spider-Man, Batman, Mickey Mouse, etc.) and celebrities (Taylor Swift, etc.) at input level. Pipeline runs 11 stages: INIT → PLANNING → CHARACTER → MOTION → KEYFRAMES → CLIPS → AUDIO → ASSEMBLY → VALIDATE → READY/PARTIAL_READY/FAILED. GPU workers (Wan2.1, Kokoro TTS) are NOT connected - keyframes, clips, audio stages return 'queued' status. Jobs end in PARTIAL_READY when GPU workers unavailable. Planning stages use real Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o-mini). Job creation takes ~30s due to 3 sequential LLM calls.

GET_credit_check.details: Returns sufficient, required, current, shortfall, breakdown with stage costs

POST_create_job.details: Creates job with atomic credit deduction, returns job_id, state, credits_deducted, cost_estimate

Safety_copyright_blocking.details: Blocks Spider-Man, Batman, Mickey Mouse and other copyrighted characters

Safety_celebrity_blocking.details: Blocks Taylor Swift and other celebrity names

GET_status.details: Returns job_id, state, progress_percent, current_stage, stage_results

GET_my_jobs.details: Returns paginated user jobs with total count

GET_chain.details: Returns all episodes in a story chain

GET_admin_pipeline_health.details: Returns total_jobs, active_jobs, ready_jobs, failed_jobs, success_rate, gpu_endpoints status

GET_admin_jobs.details: Returns all jobs with state filters and stats per state

POST_admin_retry.details: Retries FAILED/PARTIAL_READY jobs, returns 400 for non-retryable states

Non_admin_403.details: All admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users

Pipeline_progression.details: Pipeline progresses through all stages, ends in PARTIAL_READY when GPU workers unavailable

Credit_refund_on_failure.details: _fail_job() refunds credits on pipeline failure (code verified, no failures occurred during testing)

mocked_apis.note: Planning stages use real Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o-mini). GPU workers (WAN_T2V_ENDPOINT, WAN_I2V_ENDPOINT, KEYFRAME_GEN_ENDPOINT, KOKORO_TTS_ENDPOINT) are NOT connected - adapters return 'queued' status by design.

pipeline_behavior.planning_stages: Use real LLM (GPT-4o-mini) - episode_plan, character_continuity, scene_motion_plans generated successfully
pipeline_behavior.gpu_stages: Return 'queued' status - keyframes, clips, audio not generated without GPU workers
pipeline_behavior.final_state: PARTIAL_READY when GPU workers unavailable, READY when all outputs exist, FAILED on errors
pipeline_behavior.cost: 21 credits per job (planning: 3, keyframes: 5, clips: 10, audio: 2, assembly: 1)
